underlying_goal: Understand and modify the top navigation bar of a web app to hide Home and Effects items on desktop while keeping mobile unaffected, with documentation of the analysis
friction_detail: Claude used too many tools without approval prompting user to add a new approval rule, and initial document had errors (homepage incorrectly listed as showing nav items).
brief_summary: User wanted to understand and hide Home/Effects nav items on desktop only, generate analysis docs, and configure approval rules — all achieved successfully with minor document corrections needed.
